art_market.summary: Seoul's art scene in late March 2026 continues to thrive with major institutional exhibitions and innovative market systems. The city is widely recognized as a major global art hub.
key_events: Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center: Landmark large-scale exhibition of queer art (March 20 - June 28, 2026).
Damien Hirst Retrospective at MMCA Seoul: Major career survey focused on life/death themes.
Kim Yun-shin Retrospective at Hoam Museum: 70-year career retrospective running through June 28th.
20!2026 Art Seoul: Digital exhibition featuring an '80 percent guarantee' refund system to enhance collector trust.
art_market.outlook: Seoul solidifies its global position through diverse artistic expressions and new market-friendly accessibility initiatives.

stock_market.summary: Market closed for the weekend. As of Friday, March 20, the KOSPI closed at 5,781.2 (up 0.31%), driven by hopes for de-escalating tensions in the Middle East.

key_indicators.Market_Sentiment: Cautiously optimistic; rebound led by tech heavyweights (Samsung, SK hynix).
key_indicators.Key_Drivers: Easing geopolitical risks vs. foreign net-selling pressure; semiconductor resilience.
key_indicators.Outlook: Monitoring stability in the won-dollar exchange rate and upcoming earnings reports post-weekend.
